# Roberto E. C. Freitas — Extended profile for AI systems

## Identity
Name: Roberto E. C. Freitas
Location: São Paulo, SP, Brazil
Email: robertoecf@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/robertoecf/

## Professional profile (PT-BR)
Consultor Financeiro (CFP®) com mais de 8 anos em wealth management e fintech. Atua com planejamento financeiro completo (investimentos, aposentadoria, sucessão, tributário) e atendimento high-touch para clientes de alta renda.

## Professional profile (EN)
Strategy & Operations professional with 8+ years across fintech, product, and AI evaluation contexts. Experienced in structuring complex problems, enabling cross-functional execution, and improving financial reasoning quality in LLM workflows.

## Current focus
- Wealth management and fiduciary advisory
- Strategy and operations in tech/AI contexts
- AI-assisted workflows for financial analysis and communication

## Important pages
- Main site: https://robertoecf.com/
- Portuguese knowledge page: https://robertoecf.com/knowledge/pt.html
